chunks.text: DHCP service unavailable | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar DHCP service unavailable Earlier today, around 6pm, the DHCP service ceased functioning, causing systems that obtain their IP addressing dynamical

systems that obtain their IP addressing dynamically to be unable obtain an IP address to use when connecting to the network. Most systems that use DHCP to obtain their IP address will be affected by this and will not be able to connect to the networ

this and will not be able to connect to the network after reboot or lengthy disconnection from the network. Systems that use DHCP but have already obtained an address may be able to stay on the network during this service malfunction – this depends o

k during this service malfunction – this depends on how individual systems are configured. Systems that do not rely upon DHCP (statically configured hostnames/addresses) should be unaffected by this problem. Staff are looking into the cause of this

problem. Staff are looking into the cause of this problem. UPDATE [2008-05-30 01:21:52 | Jon Kuroda] DHCP service was restored late Thursday evening via a temporary fix around 11:30PM. However, it appears that there are still problems with obtaining

pears that there are still problems with obtaining DHCP leases for many systems. Staff are still looking into the problem and into a more permanent solution. UPDATE [2008-05-30 09:42:54 | Jon Kuroda] An attempt at around 8:15am this morning to revert

An attempt at around 8:15am this morning to revert to an earlier version of the DHCP software as a more permanent solution to last night’s DHCP service outage proved unsuccessful. Last night’s temporary fix was put back into place at 8:45am and DHCP

ry fix was put back into place at 8:45am and DHCP service was restored. Staff are still looking into the cause and for a more permanent solution. Also, apologies for the confusing dates on the previous update(s) Resolved as of 2008-05-30 09:44:00 Pri

s update(s) Resolved as of 2008-05-30 09:44:00 Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
